case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS KRIKORIAN, RAMI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KRIKORIAN, RAMI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KRIKORIAN, RAMI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRIKORIAN, RAMI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.87, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO RAMI KRIKORIAN RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN
